hotels.name: Huashan International Youth Hostel
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Huashan International Youth Hostel se situe à Huayin, à respectivement 900 mètres et 4,1 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Huashan Bus Station et Huayin City Planning Construction Exhibition Hall. Il met à votre disposition un bar, un parking privé gratuit ainsi qu’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux. Cette auberge de jeunesse est à respectivement 6,6 km et 7,3 km environ de : Xiyue Temple et Huashan North Railway Station. Vous pourrez profiter d'un service d'étage, d'une réception ouverte 24h/24 et d'un service de bagagerie.
Les hébergements comprennent un bureau. Vous bénéficierez d'une salle de bains privative dotée d’une douche, d'un sèche-cheveux et de chaussons. Vous profiterez aussi d’une armoire.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Huashan International Youth Hostel in Huayin offers private and shared rooms with balconies, private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and soundproofing. Each room includes a work desk, sofa bed, and wardrobe.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a sun terrace, bar, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a plunge pool, washing machine, and free on-site private parking. The hostel provides a minimarket, express check-in and check-out, and luggage storage.
Convenient Location: Located less than 1 km from Huashan Bus Station and 135 km from Yuncheng Zhangxiao Airport, the hostel is near attractions such as Huayin City Planning Construction Exhibition Hall (4.1 km) and Xiyue Temple (7 km). Highly rated for its host, hiking, and convenient location.

Tous les hébergements comprennent la climatisation, un bureau, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit, des serviettes et un patio offrant une vue sur la ville.

Dining Experience: The romantic restaurant serves Chinese and American cuisines, including vegetarian options. Brunch, dinner, high tea, and cocktails are available in a comfortable setting.
Comfortable Amenities: The hotel features a bar, coffee shop, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a games room, solarium, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Convenient Location: Located 1.8 km from Huashan North Railway Station and 129 km from Yuncheng Zhangxiao Airport, the hotel is an 18-minute walk from Xiyue Temple.

Situé à Haikou, l’établissement Pullman Haikou comprend une piscine extérieure, une salle de sport, un jardin et un restaurant. Cet hôtel possède un bar ainsi qu’un bain de source chaude, et bénéficie d’un emplacement de choix dans ce quartier : Meilan District. Dining Experience: The modern, romantic restaurant serves Chinese, British, American, Japanese, and barbecue grill cuisines for brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea. A buffet breakfast is available daily.
Convenient Location: Located 19 km from Haikou Meilan International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Baishamen Park (2.7 km) and Hainan University (4.9 km).
